required_states: Security Hub CSPM delegated administrator designated
Security Hub CSPM integrated with AWS Organizations

conditions: Security Hub CSPM is integrated with AWS Organizations and a delegated administrator and home Region are designated.
decision_context: Use when consistent Security Hub configuration and standards are required across account groups.
exclusions: Central configuration does not replace preventive permission controls or resource remediation workflows.

source_references.locator: Understanding central configuration; How central configuration works
source_references.supported_proposition: A delegated administrator centrally configures account and OU security policies across configured Regions.

statement: Security Hub CSPM central configuration lets a delegated administrator apply configuration policies for Security Hub, standards, and controls to organization accounts or OUs across a home Region and linked Regions.
